stateDiagram

%% Initial state name as "." so that it fits in black circle shape.
%% See https://github.com/StateSmith/StateSmith/issues/404
state "." as ROOT.(InitialState)

TrafficLightStateRed

TrafficLightStateRed : TrafficLightStateRed

TrafficLightStateRed : enter / #123; turnOnRedLight()#59; ampelTime = 0#59; #125;

TrafficLightStateRed : exit / #123; turnOffRedLight()#59; #125;

TrafficLightStateRed : tick / #123; ampelTime++#59; #125;

TrafficLightStateRedYellow

TrafficLightStateRedYellow : TrafficLightStateRedYellow

TrafficLightStateRedYellow : enter / #123; turnOnRedLight()#59; turnOnYellowLight()#59; ampelTime = 0#59; #125;

TrafficLightStateRedYellow : exit / #123; turnOffRedLight()#59; turnOffYellowLight()#59; #125;

TrafficLightStateRedYellow : tick / #123; ampelTime++#59; #125;

TrafficSchranke

TrafficSchranke : TrafficSchranke

TrafficSchranke : enter / #123; openSchranke()#59; turnOnRedLight()#59; #125;

TrafficSchranke : exit / #123; closeSchranke()#59; wait()#59;turnOffRedLight()#59; #125;

TrafficLightGreen

TrafficLightGreen : TrafficLightGreen

TrafficLightGreen : enter / #123; turnOnGreenLight()#59; ampelTime = 0#59; #125;

TrafficLightGreen : exit / #123; turnOffGreenLight()#59; #125;

TrafficLightGreen : tick / #123; ampelTime++#59; #125;

TrafficLightYellow

TrafficLightYellow : TrafficLightYellow

TrafficLightYellow : enter / #123; turnOnYellowLight()#59; ampelTime = 0#59; #125;

TrafficLightYellow : exit / #123; turnOffYellowLight()#59; #125;

TrafficLightYellow : tick / #123; ampelTime++#59; #125;

ROOT.(InitialState) --> TrafficLightStateRed : / #123; initRedLight()#59; initYellowLight()#59; initGreenLight()#59; #125;

TrafficLightStateRed --> TrafficLightStateRedYellow : requestGreen

TrafficLightStateRed --> TrafficSchranke : schranke

TrafficLightStateRedYellow --> TrafficLightGreen : tick [ampelTime > 2000]

TrafficSchranke --> TrafficLightStateRed : ampel

TrafficLightGreen --> TrafficLightYellow : tick [ampelTime > 5000]

TrafficLightYellow --> TrafficLightStateRed : tick [ampelTime > 3000]
Events
settings
